citations.description: Ticket comment by RebarBotNava: 'Change up for review as Gerrit #942 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/942). Local gates green: make lint, make typecheck, make test all pass; runner.py 725/800 LOC. Awaiting LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1.'

findings.criterion: `make test`, `make lint`, and `make typecheck` all pass locally; the change lands via Gerrit with `Verified +1` and `LLM-Review +1`.
findings.detail: The ticket comment (the only attestation available) explicitly states the change is 'Awaiting LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1' — meaning neither vote has been received. The criterion requires both votes to be cast before it is met. The local gate results ('make lint, make typecheck, make test all pass') are reported but cannot be verified from the codebase, and the Gerrit votes are confirmed absent by the author's own comment.
findings.remediation: Record a follow-up ticket comment once Gerrit #942 receives both LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1, naming the vote timestamps and reviewer identities as proof.

data.remediation: How to resolve the unmet criteria: for each one, decide whether the work is genuinely incomplete or simply undocumented. If a requirement is already satisfied but the proof is not discoverable from the code alone, add a comment to this ticket that documents the evidence — cite the concrete artifacts that meet the requirement (file paths and line ranges, commands and their output, links, or the reasoning that ties the work to the criterion). The completion verifier reads this ticket's comments, so evidence you record there is taken into account on the next verification. For any criterion whose work is genuinely unfinished, complete it, then re-verify.
